the hovered heatmap cell visually highlighted
I can clearly identify the selected data point.
the user hovers over a heatmap cell
the system visually highlights the hovered heatmap cell while displaying tooltip information.

97.title: Display Refresh Icon in Near-Miss Heatmap Widget

content.text: The system shall display a refresh icon within the Near-Miss Heatmap widget header.
a refresh icon displayed in the Near-Miss Heatmap widget header
I can manually refresh heatmap analytics data.
the Near-Miss Heatmap widget is displayed
the system displays a refresh icon within the Near-Miss Heatmap widget header.
Upon clicking the refresh icon, the system shall reload the Near-Miss Heatmap analytics data.
the Near-Miss Heatmap analytics data refreshed when clicking the refresh icon
I can view the latest near-miss trend information.
the refresh icon is displayed in the Near-Miss Heatmap widget header
the user clicks the refresh icon
the system reloads the Near-Miss Heatmap analytics data.
